legal.title: Legal Notice & Privacy Policy
legal.subtitle: Regulatory information, GDPR compliance, and map credits.
legal.editor_desc: CityMaster is an independent, interactive educational web mapping application.
legal.hosting_desc: The application is hosted locally or on secure Cloud servers following modern security standards.
legal.credits_desc: Map data provided by OpenStreetMap (© OpenStreetMap contributors, ODbL license). Tiles by Leaflet and Esri. Geospatial processing powered by Turf.js and Overpass API.
legal.rgpd_desc: CityMaster respects your privacy. No personal data is sold or shared with third parties. User preferences (language, theme, avatar, and scores) are stored securely in local browser storage (LocalStorage/application database). Under GDPR rules, you have the right to access, modify, or delete your data anytime upon request or via your profile.
legal.cookies_desc: CityMaster does not use advertising cookies or third-party tracking scripts. Technical local storage (LocalStorage) is strictly used to save your in-game preferences.

landing.hero_subtitle: Test your knowledge of streets, housing estates, and neighborhoods in real-time with OpenStreetMap.
landing.feature_1_desc: Explore any municipality using live OpenStreetMap geographical data.
landing.feature_2_desc: Target placement, Sprint time-attack, or Name identification mode.
landing.feature_3_desc: Play on smartphone, tablet, or desktop with offline support.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to save your scores.
auth.register_subtitle: Create an account to save your achievements.

welcome.title: CityMaster
welcome.subtitle: Master the geography, streets, and housing estates of your city.
welcome.city_placeholder: Search a city (e.g. Paris, London, New York...)

loading.generating_city: Generating map data (this may take a few seconds)...

feedback.prompt_identify: What is the name of this street or district?
feedback.perfect: Perfect! You are right on the street.
feedback.near: Not bad! You are {distance}m from the street.
feedback.miss: Missed! You were {distance}m away. Here is the actual location.
feedback.timeout_guess: Time's up! You did not select a location.
feedback.identify_timeout: Time's up! The correct answer was: {name}

leaderboard.no_scores: No scores recorded yet. Be the first!
